title: Repo Registry
description: Maps repo slugs to their metadata: remote URL, purpose, deploy target, dependencies, entry points, and domain category.

remote.description: Git remote URL for the repository

purpose.description: One-line description of what the repo does

deploy.description: Deployment platform, or null if not deployed

depends_on.description: Slugs of repos this repo depends on

entry_points.description: Key file patterns (globs or paths) that define the repo's surface

domain.description: High-level category grouping repos by purpose
